title: Persistent agent_loop checkpointing via MapSqliteSaver
description: Swap MemorySaver for MapSqliteSaver in agent_loop so the daemon resumes correctly after restart — currently operator_interrupt state is lost on exit.
acceptance_criteria: agent_loop uses MapSqliteSaver(db_path) as checkpointer instead of MemorySaver
Interrupted daemon (operator_interrupt route) can be resumed with --resume flag without re-running reconcile+poll from scratch
Clean exit still works; --once still works; --dry-run still works
